examples: I reached up to unpin it.
Swiftly they remove their hats, unpin their shawls, and... whap, whap, whap!
If you want the change to affect the icon on the taskbar, you'll need to unpin and repin it to the taskbar so that the new shortcut takes affect.
Apps you buy from Pokki are automatically pinned to the taskbar, though you can unpin them.
